title: Makin Marec
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]|[[Makin]], the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] admiral}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image= |name=Makin Marec |homeworld= |birth= |death=Prior to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=[[Clan Fett|Fett]] |parents= |partners=[[Ailyn Vel]] |siblings= |children=[[Mirta Gev]] |affiliation=[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I spent two summers with Papa on Null, after he and Mama split up. He taught me everything he could. And then he got killed.|[[Mirta Gev]]|}} '''Makin Marec''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]], who came into contact with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ailyn Vel]] some [[Time/Legends|time]] prior to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. While Vel had initially been interested in Mandalorians only in an effort to better understand and hunt her estranged [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Marec and Vel eventually entered into a relationship, [[Marriage/Legends|married]], and [[Reproduction/Legends|conceived]] a daughter together whom they named [[Mirta Gev|Mirta]]. Marec's relationship with Vel ultimately came to an end, though he continued to care for his daughter. Spending two [[Summer/Legends|summers]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Null/Legends|Null]] with Mirta, Marec taught his daughter everything he could, including lessons on Mandalorian culture and how to speak the [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']] [[Language/Legends|language]] during their time together. He later [[Death/Legends|perished]] aboard a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] during a [[Hull/Legends|hull]] breach, leaving Mirta to mourn the loss of her [[Parent/Legends|father]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Why'd Ailyn marry a Mando? Sintas must have warned her we're bad news.''"
"''She hung around ''Mando'ade'' to get a better idea of how to hunt you. Then she met Papa. It didn't last.''"
"''Romantic.''"
"''She cared about him.''"
"''And she let him make a Mando of you.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and Mirta Gev|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Makin Marec was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|fall]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' Marec met the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ailyn Vel]]. In an effort to better understand and hunt her estranged [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Vel had taken to spending [[Time/Legends|time]] among Mandalorians, eventually coming into contact with Marec. Marec and Vel began a relationship, and later [[Marriage/Legends|married]], even coming to [[Reproduction/Legends|conceive]] a daughter together whom they named [[Mirta Gev|Mirta]]. However, Vel and Marec's relationship was not to last, and the two later [[Divorce/Legends|divorced]]. As she grew, Mirta came to regard Marec as "Papa," and spent two [[Summer/Legends|summers]] with her father on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Null/Legends|Null]], a world in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' There, Marec taught Mirta everything he could during their time together, instructing her on her Mandalorian heritage and the culture she had a connection to. Marec eventually [[Death/Legends|died]] aboard a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], during an unfortunate [[Hull/Legends|hull]] breach, leaving Mirta to mourn the loss of one of her parents. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, Mirta recalled her father and his influence on her life during a number of brief conversations with her maternal grandfather, Boba Fett, following a reconciliation between the estranged family members. Fett credited Makin Marec with Mirta's decision to grow up Mandalorian. ==Behind the scenes== First given a nameless mention in the novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'', written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published in [[2006]], Makin Marec was later named and further detailed in Traviss' [[2007]] second entry into the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel series, entitled [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']]. Marec was later indirectly mentioned in Traviss' subsequent novel, [[Legacy of the Force: Revelation|''Revelation'']], and given an informational entry in the [[2008]] reference book, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stID|Makin Marec}} {{Mo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Makin Marec }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Marec, Makin}} [[Category:Clan Fett]] [[Category:Males]]
